---
# PLEASE DO NOT EDIT "layout"
layout: "../layouts/Layout.astro"


# Banner type, can be either "color" or "image"
bannerType: "image"
# Banner color or an image depending on the banner type set above,
# either provide a color inside quotes or a path to an image (external links are supported)
banner: "https://i.imgur.com/5w5nSKK.gif"


# User avatar to display, can be external link or a path to an image from public folder
avatar: "https://img.freepik.com/free-psd/3d-illustration-person-with-sunglasses_23-2149436188.jpg"


# Discord custom nickname set above
displayName: "Ritu Raj Pratap Singh"


# Username on discord, follows the case you set, won't track your Discord account e.g. "riturajps"
username: "riturajps"


# Discord status, can be "online-mobile", "online", "idle", "do-not-disturb", "invisible" or "streaming"
status: "online"


# Badges next to avatar, some badges need metadata such as "date" or "username"
# all names are available at public/badges/margins folder
badges:
  # "hypesquad-balance":
  "active-developer":
  # An example of metadata usage, you may uncomment following lines by removing "#":
  # "nitro":
  #   date: "13 May 2020"
  # "legacy-username":
  #   username: "riturajps"


# Roles in profile: Key name stands for the label, value is the color
roles:
  "Backend Developer": "#006f72"
  "API Design & Security": "#9b2335"
  "FOSS Contributor": "#ffecc1"
  "Cybersecurity Enthusiast": "#4c61ffff"


# Connections, all connections are available at public/connections folder
# "verified" key is optional but indicates verified icon
# if "url" key is not provided, then the external link icon won't appear
connections:
  github:
    username: "theriturajps"
    url: "https://github.com/theriturajps"
    verified: true
  instagram:
    username: "riturajps"
    url: "https://www.instagram.com/riturajps"
    verified: true
  twitter:
    username: "riturajps"
    url: "https://twitter.com/@riturajps"
    verified: true
  telegram:
    username: "riturajps"
    url: "https://telegram.me/riturajps"
    verified: true
---

<!-- Your About Me section -->

Hi, I'm an independent developer based in **Bihar**, **India**.

Passionate **backend and web developer** with 6+ production-level API projects using **Node.js**, **Express**, and **MongoDB**. Pursuing MCA at **IIIT Ranchi** & **IIT Patna** (2025–2027) with a **B.Sc. in IT** (2022–2025). Skilled in **RESTful/CRUD APIs**, **SQL Server**, **MongoDB**, **Linux**, **JavaScript**, **Python**, and **Git**. Focused on building scalable backend solutions.


I'm interested in watching **Sci/Fi movies**, **Studying** and **experimenting with API**.
